inputs.description: Skill subset, e.g. code-review sdd. Leave empty for full suite.
Skill to open review for, e.g. code-review or sdd.
Recipe to eval (review, implement, discover, spec, plan, verify…)

tasks.label: Eval: Full A/B Suite (parallel 3 workers)
tasks.detail: Parallel: 3 skills simultaneously. --ambient-goose required for keychain providers.

tasks.label: Eval: A/B Suite Subset
tasks.detail: Run only selected skills, e.g. 'code-review sdd'.

tasks.label: SDD: Discover feature
tasks.detail: Discovery phase — user stories, personas, problem statement → .specs/ + Beads epic

tasks.label: SDD: Write spec
tasks.detail: Formal spec — WHEN/THEN/SHALL ACs with [FEAT]-NN IDs → .specs/features/[feature]/spec.md

tasks.label: Eval: Full A/B Suite + Post-Suite Workflow
tasks.detail: Suite → analyze → export history → build trend report → open both views.
tasks.command: python3 scripts/run-skill-ab-suite.py --continue-on-failure --ambient-goose --max-workers 3 --goose-cli "${config:agenticDevelopment.gooseEvalCli}" && python3 scripts/analyze-skill-eval-results.py --check --negative-delta-gate --efficiency-gate && python3 scripts/export-eval-history.py && python3 scripts/build-eval-report.py && xdg-open dist/evals/report/index.html

tasks.label: Eval: Analyze Results + Open Analysis Index
Eval: Export History (DB → JSON)
tasks.detail: Exports evaluation.db → evals/history/runs.json for GitHub Pages and CI. Run after every suite.

tasks.label: Eval: Build Trend Report
tasks.detail: Generates dist/evals/report/index.html from evaluation.db (or runs.json fallback).

tasks.label: Eval: Post-Suite Workflow
tasks.detail: Analyze + Export history + Build trend report + Open both views. Run after every suite.
tasks.command: python3 scripts/analyze-skill-eval-results.py --check --negative-delta-gate --efficiency-gate && python3 scripts/export-eval-history.py && python3 scripts/build-eval-report.py && xdg-open dist/evals/report/index.html && xdg-open dist/evals/skills/analysis-index.html

tasks.label: Eval: Recipes — Full Suite
tasks.detail: Run all 12 recipe A/B evals. --ambient-goose required for keychain providers.

tasks.label: Eval: Recipes — Single recipe
tasks.detail: A/B eval for one recipe. Prompts for name (e.g. review, implement, discover).

tasks.label: Eval: Recipes — Subset
tasks.detail: A/B eval for selected recipes (space-separated). Prompts for list.

tasks.label: Eval: Agents — Full Suite
tasks.detail: Run all 12 agent A/B evals. --ambient-goose required.

tasks.label: Eval: Agents — Single agent
tasks.detail: A/B eval for one agent. Prompts for name (e.g. review-critic, tdd-guide).

tasks.label: Eval: All Kinds — Full Suite (skills + recipes + agents)
tasks.detail: Complete evaluation: skills (parallel 3), then recipes, then agents.
tasks.command: python3 scripts/run-skill-ab-suite.py --continue-on-failure --ambient-goose --max-workers 3 --goose-cli "${config:agenticDevelopment.gooseEvalCli}" && python3 scripts/run-harness-ab-suite.py --kind recipes --continue-on-failure --ambient-goose --goose-cli "${config:agenticDevelopment.gooseEvalCli}" && python3 scripts/run-harness-ab-suite.py --kind agents --continue-on-failure --ambient-goose --goose-cli "${config:agenticDevelopment.gooseEvalCli}"

tasks.label: Harness: Build Documentation
tasks.detail: Runs pandoc to generate dist/docs/html/ and also builds the eval trend report.

tasks.label: Harness: Validate All Recipes
tasks.detail: Runs goose recipe validate on every .goose/recipes/**/*.yaml file.
tasks.command: find .goose/recipes -name '*.yaml' | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c 'printf "%s: " "{}" && goose recipe validate "{}" 2>&1'

tasks.label: Harness: Install / Update Local Config
tasks.detail: Copies recipes, skills, agents to ~/.config/goose and ~/.agents, updates slash commands.
